name: Morgan Robotics Support Path
overview: Robotics-related questions can be routed through Morgan engineering and mechatronics contacts when a specific public team lead is not listed in the advising dataset.

name: Computer Science Student Support Network
overview: Computer Science student inquiries about faculty, undergraduate guidance, and department-connected opportunities can be routed through the Computer Science department.

name: Nursing Student Support Network
overview: Nursing student questions about academic progression, department resources, and advising coordination can be routed through the Department of Nursing.

name: Computer Science Undergraduate Research Path
overview: Computer Science undergraduate research questions can be routed through the department's undergraduate studies leadership and advising path.

name: AI and Data Research Support Path
overview: Students looking for AI and data-science research guidance can start with the Computer Science chair or department contact path when a specific public lab lead is not listed.

name: Cybersecurity Research Support Path
overview: Cybersecurity research and student-opportunity questions can be routed through Computer Science undergraduate leadership or department advising contacts.

name: Biology Undergraduate Research Path
overview: Biology undergraduate research questions can be routed through the Department of Biology for faculty and laboratory opportunity guidance.
